'''''Glorious''''' was a [[Belarus-class medium cruiser|''Belarus''-class medium cruiser]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

During [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence's]] operation to secure the [[Teljkon Vagabond]], ''Glorious'' served as [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ejagga Pakkpekatt|Pakkpekatt's]] command ship. Other command staff included, [[Fleet Command (New Republic)/Legends|Fleet Office]] liaison [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Garch]] intelligence officer [[Ixidro Legorburu]], then-[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Ijix Harona]], Doctor [[Archimar]], and petty officers [[Jiod]], [[Marty]], [[Taisden]], [[Sparks (petty officer)|Sparks]] and [[Pleck]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{Mo}}
